beIN SPORTS MAX 4.desc: This will be Norway and Senegal’s first World Cup meeting. Their only previous encounter came in a March 2006 friendly in Dakar – Senegal won 2-1. The event features three days of top-level CSI5* action, highlighted by the LGCT Grand Prix of Madrid on Sunday, where leading riders and horses compete for key championship points.

beIN SPORTS 9.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Shanghai  Jumping - Round 1 Competition Team
beIN SPORTS 9.desc: Held at the Shanghai Juss International Equestrian Centre, featuring CSI5* show jumping with fences up to 1.60m. The schedule includes the Global Champions League team competition and the Grand Prix, with riders earning points toward the season standings. Technical courses emphasize combinations and time allowed on a compact arena.
